rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop) + Cowork.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture names Claude Code (web variant + GitHub app), Claude Code scheduled tasks, GitHub Actions, GitHub Apps, Slack apps as illustrative shapes — framed as 'one natural runtime' rather than asserting these are AE101's runtime; no claude.ai dependency.

Three shape paragraphs hedge cleanly ('Typically, either … or …'); maintainer block 2026-04-29 capability-source notes ground Slack-trigger wording in Slack Events API model and GitHub-issue wording in GitHub Actions issues events; 'Do not imply Claude Code runs inside Slack' explicitly captured in maintainer note.
Scheduled-read paragraph names 'Claude Code scheduled tasks' — matches §6 Routines/scheduled-tasks vocabulary; no Shift+P, no claude.ai-only feature, no broken-out concurrency claim.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Sessions are the unit of work.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Lecture does not instruct a student to open or resume sessions; runtime mentions are illustrative shapes, not student operations.

Body ships zero practitioner citations by deliberate strategic choice (cohort is two modules in, hasn't met the practitioners). Maintainer block tracks deferred citations: Klaassen/Every [practitioner direct] with research-folder URL, Ronacher [practitioner direct]. Earned-landings deferred to M5–M6 — within §1 maintainer-only scope.
No dated evidence claims in body; deferred citations in maintainer block point at 2026-04-21 Klaassen run (within window).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source-verification maintainer block on student-facing files with practitioner citations.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Body ships un-attributed; no in-body URLs to verify at first-cohort. Deferred attributions earn landings at M5–M6 where their host files carry the verification block. Lecture's maintainer block already names the deferral reasoning and earned-landing locations.

Lecture contains no `**Prompt**` fenced blocks and no `{{prompt:<key>}}` markers — meta-frame closer, read-aloud only. Coverage of associated chained prompts flows through `extract-the-task-shaping-rule.md` mechanical run per maintainer note.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forcing functions live in prompts, not body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Closer lecture, no forcing function to encode; the work landed in the M2 exercises upstream.

platform_claims_checked.claim: @Claude routes it into Claude Code on the web, or a Slack app listens for the message and passes it to an agent runtime
a GitHub Actions workflow or GitHub App picks it up. The usual go-to agents in GitHub are Claude Code through its GitHub app and GitHub Copilot
Claude Code scheduled tasks are one natural runtime for this shape
